name: Melhoria Descrição — Consulta Produtos por IDs

parameters.query:
SELECT
    p.id                            AS "ID",
    p.title                         AS "TITULO",
    p.advertisement_description_1   AS "DESCRICAO",
    COALESCE(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'index', pa.name,
                'value', pa.value
            )
        ) FILTER (WHERE pa.name IS NOT NULL),
        '[]'::jsonb
    )                               AS "CARACTERISTICAS"
FROM
    anymarket_prd.product p
LEFT JOIN
    anymarket_prd.product_attribute pa ON pa.id_product = p.id
WHERE
    p.id IN ({{ $json.idsForSql }})
GROUP BY
    p.id, p.title, p.advertisement_description_1
ORDER BY
    p.id;
